Assistant Chief Woodbury was a hero who died in the line of service

I hope your 2026 is filled with joy and fulfillment, and I’m looking forward to another busy year representing Maine’s Second District.
From my family to yours: Merry Christmas, Mainers.

My bipartisan SPEED Act will lower costs by cutting red tape and providing more certainty for those trying to produce the things we need

Yesterday, my bipartisan permitting reform bill passed through the House Natural Resources Committee.

The SPEED Act slashes red tape so we can get America building again — from energy projects, roads and bridges, to desperately needed housing.
